---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Brockley
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve. Example: "I need to run graphs on a schedule, but there is no built-in cron trigger."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as practical.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they fall short.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
